title: AT&T loses key ruling in bid to stop offering basic phone service in California
summary: California can keep enforcing rules that require AT&T to offer basic phone service to new customers in its wireline territory, following a federal judge’s ruling last week. The case is in US District Court for the Southern District of California.
caption: output/2026-07-20/at-t-loses-key-ruling-in-bid-to-stop-offering-basic-phone-service-in-c.txt
